name: llm-judge
description: CLI + pipeliner module for evaluating artifacts with LLMs — Swiss Elo ranking, pass/gate, and qualitative review. Unblocks EA fitness selection and gate checks on generated documents.

env.name: LLM_JUDGE_API_KEY
env.description: API key for --provider minimax or --provider openai. If not set, uses keyring via pass.

env.name: LLM_JUDGE_API_BASE
env.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible provider. Optional.
